name: the red-team pack feeds the H-16 frontier pre-release readiness checklist
command: printf 'resource x {}\n' > a.tf && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/redteam-review.sh" --artifact a.tf --emit json 2>/dev/null >o.json; node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("o.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.feeds&&j.feeds.h16?0:1)' && echo w13-feeds-h16 1>&2
